name: @prism3/plugin
description: Prism3 Figma plugin (docs/18, docs/22). Two contexts: a main-thread controller that writes figma.variables, and the shared web UI in the iframe. #107 is the scaffold (manifest + two-context split + typed postMessage bridge); #108 is the main-thread write adapter (WritePlan → live figma.variables); the shared-UI bundle (#110) lands later.
